CustomField.description: Check this box to designate this as a universal template - i.e. This opportunity can be used as a template (provided FIT Template is also checked) regardless of the travelling countries.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box to designate this as a universal template - i.e. This opportunity can be used as a template (provided FIT Template is also checked) regardless of the travelling countries.
CustomField.label: Is Universal Template
